hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $path = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($path -like '*.cs' -and $path -notlike '*Tests.cs') { dotnet build --nologo -v quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 }

$raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $path = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($path -like '*Tests.cs') { $proj = Split-Path $path -Parent; dotnet test $proj --nologo -v quiet 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8 }
